description_long: This is an adult woman dressed in professional business attire, featuring a fitted collared blouse tucked into a knee-length pencil skirt. She wears high-heeled shoes and fingerless gloves, and her hair is styled in a high ponytail. The figure has a confident, upright posture with arms slightly outstretched and hands relaxed. She is accessorized with large, stylish glasses that cover her eyes. The overall appearance suggests a modern, urban professional, suitable for office or city street environments. The clothing and accessories are form-fitting and tailored, emphasizing a polished, businesslike look.
description: A professionally dressed adult woman in business attire with a high ponytail, glasses, and high heels, standing upright with arms slightly out. She exudes a modern, urban professional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared blouse, pencil skirt, glasses, gloves, and high-heeled shoes, with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the high ponytail, fitted skirt, and the side of the glasses and gloves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blouse, skirt with a rear slit, ponytail, and the heels.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same profile features as the left, including the ponytail, skirt, and gloves.
attribute_clothing_type: business blouse and pencil skirt with fingerless gloves and large glasses
attribute_hairstyle: long hair in a high ponytail
